messages.text: Reminder: domestic remote-work exceptions can be approved by managers.
International remote work still needs Legal and Payroll approval before travel.
No customer data may be copied to personal laptops during remote work.
Payroll exports are restricted data and must stay in VaultLake.
Security review is mandatory for any vendor touching customer data.
The DPA and procurement owner have to be recorded before launch.
Client dinners are capped at USD 75 per person.
Receipts over USD 25 need to be uploaded within 5 business days.
Laptop refresh is on a 36-month cycle.
Stolen devices must be reported to IT within 1 hour.
Temporary loaners are available during approved repairs.
Sales enablement training for Nimbus is due July 10, 2026.
The support macro name is NIMBUS-GA-2026.
The April API incident was classified as P1.
The immediate fix was rolling back the rate limiter.
The postmortem action owner is Platform Reliability.
The wellness stipend is USD 60 per month.
The learning stipend is USD 1,200 annually after 90 days.
